meta.title: BIODUSTRY | Engineering the Future of Molecular Industry
meta.description: Discover how BIODUSTRY transforms industrial manufacturing and agriculture through high-scale biotechnology.

hero.h1: Engineering the Future of Molecular Industry
hero.sub: We don't just study biology; we architect it. BIODUSTRY bridges the gap between lab-scale discovery and industrial-grade application.

hook.manifesto: Your industry is evolving. Is your chemistry keeping up?
hook.manifesto_sub: The molecular transition is not a future event. It is the present competitive advantage — and it starts at the enzymatic level.

pillars.sub: Our platform integrates five converging disciplines into a single, industrial-grade molecular intelligence stack.

items.title: Bio-Industrial Tech
items.sub: Molecular manufacturing solutions for industrial-scale bioproduction processes.

items.title: Agri-Tech
items.sub: Resilient crop molecular optimization — drought resistance, nutrient density, and adaptive genetics.

items.title: Food-Tech
items.sub: High-efficiency molecular nutrition — precision fermentation and functional ingredient synthesis.

items.title: Circular Economy Tech
items.sub: Waste-to-value innovation through enzymatic upcycling, biogas conversion, and bio-based polymer chains.

items.title: Global Data
items.sub: Real-time molecular system insights — live telemetry from 480+ active biological process nodes.

artifacts.sub: Three live instruments demonstrating the depth of our molecular intelligence layer.

hex.title: Hexagonal Data Grid
hex.desc: Live honeycomb of biological telemetry sensors — real-time process state visualization.

shuffler.title: Molecular Shuffler
shuffler.desc: Spring-bounce card deck cycling through active compound discovery pathways.

pulse.title: Soil Pulse
pulse.desc: EKG-style biological activity monitor — real-time enzymatic flux from active growth matrices.

cards.title: Molecular Discovery
cards.sub: We isolate, sequence, and model high-value biological compounds at the microbial level — creating IP-protected molecular blueprints for industrial application.

cards.title: Scale Engineering
cards.sub: We engineer proprietary fermentation and bioreactor systems that translate lab-scale molecular findings into continuous industrial output — without loss of efficacy.

cards.title: Market Integration
cards.sub: We deploy molecular product streams directly into agriculture, food, and manufacturing supply chains — creating measurable efficiency, circularity, and market differentiation.

footer.tagline: Scaling the Precision of Life for the Industrial Age.
